mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.icon, c.sort_order, c.is_visible, c.create_time, COUNT(p.id) AS product_count FROM category c LEFT JOIN product p ON p.category_id = c.id
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.icon, c.sort_order, c.is_visible, c.create_time ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (name, icon, parent_id, sort_order, is_visible, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{icon}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, #{isVisible}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE category
name = #{name},
icon = #{icon},
sort_order = #{sortOrder},
is_visible = #{isVisible},
update_time = #{updateTime}
WHERE id = #{id}
